no_solution_leakage.reason: The instruction explicitly states the exact fixes: 'Error::io() now takes only a single format!(...) argument instead of two arguments', 'Error::IO { source: ..., location: ... } has been replaced with Error::io_source()', 'Error::InvalidInput has been replaced with Error::invalid_input()', 'snafu::location!() calls removed'. informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are well-named with descriptive docstrings, grouped logically (fail-to-pass tests for the fix, pass-to-pass tests for CI gates clearly separated with comments), and each test function name indicates what it checks.

structured_data_schema.reason: This task involves fixing Rust compilation errors, not producing structured data output.
